items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has improved his striking by becoming more reserved and finishing fights.
items.quote: He still uses his spinning techniques. He still is flashy, but he's been really, really reserved. And he's been getting finishes, too.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan possesses an educated jab and a solid straight right hand.
items.quote: He does have an educated jab. He does have a solid straight right hand.

items.claim: Chase Hooper fails to move his head off the center line when throwing kicks.
items.quote: He does not move his head off center line. That's when he always gets caught by being countered on these kicks.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has been knocked out in his last two fights.
items.quote: This guy's been knocked out two times in a row.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has poor cardio and typically exhausts himself after the first round.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez has a round of cardio. That's about it.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is not at a UFC level of skill.
items.quote: I just don't think this guy's UFC level.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci is the best opponent Klene has faced in the UFC outside of Jasmine Jasudavicius.
items.quote: Tabitha Reachi is the best UFC fighter besides Jazz um that she's fought.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci's best round is the first round.
items.quote: I think Rei's best round is going to be round one.
